name: Sealand Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Sealand Securities Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides securities brokerage services in China. The company's services include securities investment consulting; securities trading and investment; securities underwriting and sponsorship; securities asset management; securities investment fund agency; futures intermediary; and financing and securities lending services. It also provides wealth management, corporate finance, equity and bond financing, acquisition and merger, financial debt underwriting, financial market, research, Internet finance, and credit services. The company was formerly known as Guangxi Securities Firms and changed its name to Sealand Securities Co., Ltd. in 2001. Sealand Securities Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Nanning, China.
